VAL-NAV-003.reason: Mobile hamburger menu infrastructure is correctly implemented. The hamburger button exists in the DOM with 'lg:hidden' class (visible only below 1024px). Clicking it programmatically opens a full-screen mobile navigation panel (translate-x-0), displays a backdrop overlay, prevents body scroll (overflow: hidden), and shows all nav links plus secondary links. The close button dismisses the menu (restores -translate-x-full, clears body overflow). Escape key handler is also wired. Cannot visually verify at mobile width since agent-browser viewport is fixed at 1280x720, but DOM state transitions and responsive classes are correct.

steps.observed: Button exists with aria-label='Open menu', classes include 'lg:hidden', display:none at 1280px

steps.action: Check DOM for mobile menu panel
steps.expected: Panel exists with responsive hiding and off-screen position
steps.observed: Panel exists with aria-label='Mobile navigation menu', has 'lg:hidden' and '-translate-x-full' classes

steps.expected: Menu slides in, backdrop appears, body scroll locked
steps.observed: Panel gets 'translate-x-0', backdrop opacity=1, body overflow=hidden

steps.expected: Menu slides out, backdrop hides, body scroll restored
steps.observed: Panel gets '-translate-x-full', body overflow reset to empty

VAL-NAV-005.reason: Footer renders all required sections: 3 social media icons (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube), 4 columns (Meal Plans with 5 links, Learn with 5 links, Information with 5 links, Stay Connected with newsletter form), newsletter signup with email input and Sign Up button, legal bar with copyright and 2 legal links (Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions). Responsive grid uses grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 for proper mobile/desktop layout.

steps.observed: 3 icons: Instagram, TikTok, YouTube with external links
4 columns: Meal Plans (5 links), Learn (5 links), Information (5 links), Stay Connected (newsletter)
Email input with placeholder and Sign Up button present
Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions links in legal bar with copyright

VAL-NAV-006.reason: Search overlay opens when clicking the search icon (Open search button), displaying a search input with placeholder 'Search Soul Good...' and a close (X) button. Overlay slides down below the main nav bar with transition animation (max-h transition). Clicking close button dismisses it (max-h-0, opacity-0). Pressing Escape key also closes the overlay correctly. Search input auto-focuses when opened.

steps.observed: Search overlay slides down with search input and close button visible

VAL-NAV-007.reason: Cart slide-in panel opens when clicking the cart icon. Panel slides in from the right side (fixed position, right: 0px, translate-x-0) with full backdrop blur (backdrop-filter: blur(8px), class 'backdrop-blur-sm'). Panel shows 'YOUR CART (0)' header with close button, empty state with shopping bag icon, 'Your cart is empty' message, and 'Continue Shopping' button. Body scroll is prevented when cart is open.

steps.expected: Cart panel slides in from right with backdrop blur
steps.observed: Panel slides in from right, backdrop visible with blur(8px), panel shows empty cart state

steps.expected: Cart header, empty state, continue shopping button
steps.observed: YOUR CART (0) header, shopping bag icon, empty message, Continue Shopping button all present

frictions.description: Mobile hamburger menu (VAL-NAV-003) cannot be visually verified at mobile width because agent-browser viewport is fixed at 1280x720. The hamburger button and mobile menu panel both have 'lg:hidden' class, making them invisible at desktop width. Testing was done via DOM inspection and programmatic click instead.
frictions.resolution: Verified via JavaScript DOM inspection: checked classList, computed styles, and state transitions. This approach is documented in AGENTS.md as the expected workaround for mobile-width testing.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. VAL-NAV-003 (mobile hamburger) verified via DOM inspection due to viewport limitation. VAL-NAV-005 (footer) has all sections including social icons, 4 link columns, newsletter form, and legal links. VAL-NAV-006 (search overlay) opens/closes correctly via button click and Escape key. VAL-NAV-007 (cart slide-in) opens from right with backdrop blur as specified.
